workshoptitle: Getting Ready to Deliver a LiveLab

tutorials.title: Introduction
tutorials.description: Understand the readiness model for a customer-facing LiveLabs delivery.

tutorials.title: Lab 1: Build the Facilitation Runbook
tutorials.description: Confirm roles, create the run of show, and script transitions.

tutorials.title: Lab 2: Request a LiveLabs Event Code
tutorials.description: Request an event code in WMS and verify event details before approval.

tutorials.title: Lab 3: Run the Workshop and Test the Green-Button Path
tutorials.description: Run the lab as an attendee and test the environment launch path before the event.

tutorials.title: Lab 4: Send Attendee Preflight Prerequisites
tutorials.description: Prepare attendee prerequisites, preflight email, expected first screen, and support contact.

tutorials.title: Lab 5: Run Live Prep Checks
tutorials.description: Confirm the event path, attendee prep, roles, and final author checklist.

tutorials.title: Lab 6: How to troubleshoot common issues
tutorials.description: Troubleshoot access issues, use support paths, and report broken workshop content.
